title: quercus × hispanica var. pseudosuber
intro: Quercus × hispanica var. pseudosuber is a hybrid oak tree, a cross between Quercus robur and Quercus faginea, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus × hispanica var. pseudosuber include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential neuroprotective effects. Traditional herbal preparations involve making infusions or decoctions from the leaves and bark, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
